ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the user story */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user story */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the story */,
  "assigned_to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the user story is assigned */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user story (e.g., 'To Do', 'In Progress', 'Done') */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the user story */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the user story belongs */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone to which the user story belongs */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the user story */,
  "estimated_hours" INTEGER /* Estimated hours to complete the user story */,
  "actual_hours" INTEGER /* Actual hours spent on the user story */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user story was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user story */,
  "created_by_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that created the user story */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments related to the user story */,
  "attachments" TEXT /* Attachments related to the user story */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_created_by_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_assigned_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., 'Developer', 'Project Manager', 'QA Engineer') */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team to which the user belongs */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project to which the milestone belongs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the milestone was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the milestone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user story to which the comment belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user story to which the attachment belongs */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the attachment file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the attachment file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the attachment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attachments_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("story_id")
)
